Class Employees

java.lang.Object
Employees
public class Employees extends Object
Object Representing the entirety of the database's Employees.

Primarily a List of Employee objects

    Field

    employees

  • Field Details

    • employees

      public List<Employee> employees
      List of Employee objects

  • Constructor Details

    • Employees

      public Employees(Connection connection)
      Connects to the database and initializes the object using the Employees table
      Parameters:
      connection - Connection

  • Method Details

    • getEmployee

      public Employee getEmployee(int employeeId)
      Used to display one employee's information by entering their unique id
      Parameters:
      employeeId - Unique id of the employee to retrieve information from
      Returns:
      Returns Employee object holding the employee's information

    • printAllEmployees

      public String printAllEmployees()
      Displays list of all employees in the form of a formatted string
      Returns:
      formatted string showing a list of all employee information

    • createEmployee

      public void createEmployee(Connection connection, String firstName, String lastName, String role, double wage, String status)
      Inserts new employee row in the Employees database table
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      firstName - First name of the new employee
      lastName - Last name of the new employee
      role - Role of the new employee
      wage - Hourly wage of the new employee
      status - Status of the new emplpyee

    • deleteEmployee

      public void deleteEmployee(Connection connection, int employeeId)
      Deletes the row of the employee holding the input id/\

      Not recommended to be use as cascading logic could delete important information

      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      employeeId - Id of the employee entry to be deleted

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(Connection connection, int employeeId, boolean active)
      Update the status of the employee with the related input id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection object
      employeeId - Unique id of the row to be updated
      active - True to update to Active, False to update to Inactive

    • updateWage

      public void updateWage(Connection connection, int employeeId, double wage)
      Updates the wage of the employee with the related employee id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      employeeId - Unique id of the employee to be updated
      wage - New wage after update

    • updateFirstName

      public void updateFirstName(Connection connection, int employeeId, String firstName)
      Updates first name of employee in database
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      employeeId - Unique id of the employee to be updated
      firstName - New first name after update

    • updateLastName

      public void updateLastName(Connection connection, int employeeId, String lastName)
      Updates the last name of the employee with the related employee id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      employeeId - Unique id of the employee to be updated
      lastName - New last name after update

    • updateRole

      public void updateRole(Connection connection, int employeeId, String role)
      Updates the role of the employee with the related employee id
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      employeeId - Unique id of the employee to be updated
      role - New role after updated, Reccomended options Active, Inactive
